description: VITALGear is the one stop shop for those who prefer reliable and quality bags. Carry your laptop in style with this Techno Gear bag from VITALGear. With ample space for office accessories as well as your laptop, the bag is best suited for office and general heavy duty use. Height: 48 cm Width: 33 cm Depth: 22 cm Made of Ripstop/600 D polyester One main zippered compartment with a padded separator and Velcro fastener for laptops One zippered compartment on the front with organiser pouches with black rubber earphone loop on the top Two adjustable padded shoulder straps with buckles with a trolley system and two wheels Padded haul loop for handling ease Two mesh pockets on the sides Care Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring
